verse_text: Do not let her be as one dead, like a miscarriage with its flesh half consumed.'

links.context: Show yourself to the priest: Christ gives this command in order to convince the priests by a tangible miracle that He is superior to Moses (CyrAl). The priests hold Moses to be greater than Christ, yet Christ heals a leper immediately and with His own divine authority. However, when Miriam was struck with leprosy, Moses had to seek mercy from above, and still she was only healed after seven days ([[NUM.12:10]]-15).
